title: Skill re-sequencing and steering eval
description:
Re-sequence the breakdown and project-lead skills around the bracket, and add a steering eval that regression-tests the flow.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] jit-breakdown produces the bracket spine when breaking down a breakable container.
- [ ] project-lead drives plan, review, breakdown, coverage, then implement.
- [ ] A steering suite regression-tests plan rejection, coverage-gap blocking, and a clean pass.
